purpose: Add sub assembly components to the panel...

Content: This application adds components or assemblies placed inside or touching the panel as sub assembly. Option is given to ignore certain parts. If any part that touches the panel is not to be added as a sub assembly, set the UDA “Is Loose Part To Yes”, This package also comes with the Objects.inp.

pd_benefits: Eliminates the manual process of adding the components as a sub assembly.
Relieves the detailer of  remembering if the components are added.
download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Panel Sub Assembly Builder under Application and Components
Let the Application automate the manual process.
